title: Default Args
description: Create a method with a default value for one of its arguments.
problemStatement:
Setting defaults! Define a method `greet` that takes an argument `name`. Set the default value of `name` to `"Guest"`. Print `"Hello, #{name}"` inside the method.

**Requirement:** Use the `arg = value` syntax in the parameter list.
hints: Default arguments allow you to call a method even if you skip passing a value.
expectedOutput: Prints 'Hello, Guest' when called without arguments
